# @jfmoe/smart-search 0.2.2

## Search timeout

- Raises the default `smart-search search` hard timeout from 90 to 180 seconds.
- Updates the public Skill, packaged Skill, and bilingual documentation to use the
  180-second search budget consistently.
- Adds regression coverage for the CLI default and distributed Skill contract.

## Validation

- `npm test`
- `smart-search regression`
- `smart-search smoke --mock --format json`
- Release metadata verified consistently across npm, lockfile, and Python
  package metadata.
